TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: David Benoit sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1968, byacing te 5 ru 9 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Louisiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 203 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 110 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *a*i* ő≤enoit s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru * rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a louis~…ēiana, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: David Benoit sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1968, byacing te 5 ru 9 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Louisiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 203 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 110 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
